FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: AI multi-factor model confirms bullish bias despite yen volatility
PBOC's yen-pressured context could amplify dollar strength
Energy supply risks from Gulf rebound create cross-market USD buying momentum
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY bullish signal from MA20 support and energy-driven USD demand. Buy with xm-trading.
FX.comment: AI model confirms MA20 support with energy-driven USD demand

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] DOWN: Goldman Sachs Signals Caution Amid Geopolitical Tensions
tldr_points: Iran-driven risk-off sentiment weighs on equities.
Intel's late-session strength contrasts with broad tech weakness.
Goldman Sachs warns of near-term S&P 500 downside.
STOCKS.excerpt: Geopolitical risk and mixed tech performance suggest near-term downside for the S&P 500.
STOCKS.comment: Geopolitical risk and mixed tech performance suggest near-term downside for the S&P 500.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: ETF Inflows and Rate-Easing Bias Overcome Event-Driven Noise
tldr_points: US spot ETF flows turned positive for the year, establishing a structural bid under spot exposure
Geopolitical headline (DOJ arrest) increases tail-risk demand for non-sovereign stores while rate easing bias persists
Absorbing sell-side supply via Lido/Terraform-related capital recycling sustains liquidity depth around key retracement zones
CRYPTO.excerpt: ETF inflows and rate-easing tilt lift BTC/USD above fragmented liquidity as event risk reinforces non-sovereign demand.
CRYPTO.comment: ETF inflow inflection and rate easing sustain higher-low structure, favouring upside on MA20 retests.
